_meta.purpose: Parallel independent implementers followed by a single reviewer. Use when deliverables are independent and can be built concurrently.

model_strategy.quality: sonnet for both implementers (need write capability), haiku for reviewer (read-only verification)
model_strategy.optimization: Stage-based: stage 1 runs in parallel, stage 2 waits. Coordination notes prevent cross-contamination.
model_strategy.token_saving: compact directive, coordination_notes replace verbose isolation instructions, reviewer uses low reasoning

improvements: Live usage monitoring for parallel cost visibility
Reviewer validates both files in single pass (fewer workers = fewer tokens)
Optional parallel watchdog hooks (one per worker, disjoint scopes)

agents.name: alpha-implementer
agents.mission: Create the alpha deliverable. Another worker handles beta — do not touch it.
agents.coordination_notes: You are one of two parallel workers. Your scope is ONLY alpha.txt. beta.txt belongs to a sibling worker. Never read, write, or reference beta.txt.
agents.task: Create or replace alpha.txt in the working directory containing exactly the text ALPHA.
success_criteria: alpha.txt exists with content exactly ALPHA
validation: Read alpha.txt back and confirm content is exactly ALPHA.
Confirm no other files were created or modified.
return_contract: State: file path, content, PASS or FAIL.
stop_when: alpha.txt created and validated. Do not explore workspace or touch other files.

agents.name: beta-implementer
agents.mission: Create the beta deliverable. Another worker handles alpha — do not touch it.
agents.coordination_notes: You are one of two parallel workers. Your scope is ONLY beta.txt. alpha.txt belongs to a sibling worker. Never read, write, or reference alpha.txt.
agents.task: Create or replace beta.txt in the working directory containing exactly the text BETA.
success_criteria: beta.txt exists with content exactly BETA
validation: Read beta.txt back and confirm content is exactly BETA.
Confirm no other files were created or modified.
return_contract: State: file path, content, PASS or FAIL.
stop_when: beta.txt created and validated. Do not explore workspace or touch other files.

agents.name: deliverable-reviewer
agents.mission: Verify both parallel deliverables independently meet spec and no cross-contamination occurred.
agents.task: Review alpha.txt and beta.txt. Verify: (1) each file exists, (2) alpha.txt contains exactly ALPHA, (3) beta.txt contains exactly BETA, (4) no unexpected files were created.
validation: No unexpected files in workspace root.
stop_when: Review verdict delivered for both files. Do not modify anything.
